zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续上行结构
zh.content:
当前/USD整体维持震荡偏强格局，价格运行在74.22附近并贴近24小时高点，短线买盘占优，上升结构仍延续但动能略有放缓。

MACD为0.566显示多头动能仍在释放，但信号线缺失使趋势确认有限，短期动能进入高位钝化阶段，需观察回落风险。需警惕冲高回落

支撑位关注71.95与73.40一带，短期回踩不破仍偏强；上方74.24为阶段高点，突破后或上看75.50阻力区间。

交易策略以顺势偏多为主，回踩71.90-73.00区域可分批布局多单，止损参考71.50下方，目标看向74.80至75.50区间。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL/USD) is exhibiting a mild short-term bullish structure, with price holding near 74.22 after a modest 24h gain of 1.10%. The market is consolidating just below the recent intraday high at 74.24, indicating tight-range equilibrium rather than aggressive trend expansion. Price action remains constructive above the 73.4 low, suggesting buyers are defending dips while momentum stabilizes. Volume appears steady with limited volatility.

Momentum indicators suggest a cautiously bullish bias. MACD at 0.56627577 remains positive, indicating that short-term momentum is still aligned with upward pressure, even though signal confirmation is not fully provided. In the absence of RSI data, price behavior above the 20-day SMA at 71.95 becomes a key proxy, reinforcing that the broader short-term trend remains upward as long as this level holds.

Key support is located at the session low of 73.4, with stronger structural support emerging near the 20-day SMA at 71.95. A break below this zone could expose downside risk toward the psychological 70.00 level. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 74.24, with a breakout potentially opening a path toward 75–76 in the near term. Market structure favors continuation if volume expands on breakout attempts.

From a trading perspective, SOL/USD is better approached as a range-to-breakout setup in the short term. Traders may consider accumulating near support levels around 73.4–71.95 with tight risk management, while breakout traders can watch for sustained closes above 74.24 for confirmation of bullish continuation. Stop-loss discipline remains essential given the relatively narrow daily range and potential for quick reversals. Risk-reward improves when entries are aligned with SMA support.
